chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah

text: 2956 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَعْتَمِرُ عُمْرَةً مُفْرَدَةً فَقَالَ «إِذَا رَأَيْتَ ذَا طُوًى فَاقْطَعِ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2956 - It was narrated from Yunus ibn Ya'qub, who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man performing an independent Umrah Mufradah.
Imam (as) said: "When you see Dhu Tuwa, stop the Talbiyah."
